issues.title: GemFireVectorStoreConfig issue

comments.body: Hi @spuchol81, I believe this issue is already fixed via https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/067a33dbe2b3fa24a4016c86464b80ef6cfbae1b. Could you check the latest milestone and confirm if you still see the issue? Thanks!
Looks to be fixed, please reopen @spuchol81 if something looks wrong.
